https://store.playstation.com/concept/10008741

The prophecy awaits. Barbarian Saga: The Beastmaster arrives on PlayStation 5 on September 9th, 2026! ⚔️

Revealed at the Future Games Show, this brutal 2D action-adventure brings the raw nostalgia of 80s fantasy films and classic gaming icons. Master visceral sword techniques, harness mystical beast transformations, and fight to survive a sprawling war in the beautifully hand-drawn world of Arborea.

🔥 WISHLIST ON THE PLAYSTATION STORE:
• PlayStation Store: https://store.playstation.com/concept/10008741

Physical collectors rejoice: a standard boxed physical edition for PlayStation 5 will launch simultaneously with the digital release on September 9th! Check your local retailers for pre-orders.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Cordura - Gameplay Reveal | PS5 Games
WISHLIST CORDURA NOW: https://store.playstation.com/concept/10018727

"It's a simple job, for men with nerve."

CORDURA is a co-op psychological horror and extraction game for 1-4 players where the darkness listens, learns, and mimics your friends’ voices to tear your squad apart.
Deep inside decaying Victorian mansions, your objective is clear: infiltrate, coordinate, and extract the "Roses of the Night" before the corruption claims your sanity. But in these halls, silence is your only shield, and communication is a trap. Our unique Mimic System uses proximity voice chat to imitate the voices and appearances of your teammates—making you question every call for help.

KEY FEATURES:

Tactical Co-op Extraction (1-4 Players): Venture into procedural labyrinths alone or with up to 3 friends. The threat scales with your squad size.

The Mimic System: Experience true paranoia as the environment uses your allies' voices and faces against you.

Strategic Roles: Coordination is fluid. While some head into the dark for the extraction, others can take a tactical lead by tracking threats and guiding the team via maps and radio.

Shifting Environments: These buildings are alive. Corrupted structures reshape in real-time, cutting off your escape routes when you least expect it.

Permadeath Stakes: Every worker is unique. If you fall, your gear and progress are lost.

#ps5 #ps5games #Cordura #horrorgames  #futuregamesshow  #coophorror  #indiedev  #gaming  #trailer  #ItsASimpleJob #ps5 #coopgaming #multiplayer

text:
Marsupilami 2 - Salsa Palombia - Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10017553

Play as 3 brave heroes with unique abilities in a turbo-charged 2.5D platformer
 
A strange melody has swept across Palombia… and all the animals have suddenly started dancing, leaving chaos in their wake! The creature behind this crazy beat is none other than the Mummy Queen, back from the Land of the Dead with her minions to play a cursed concert with a calamitous crescendo.
 
Journey through four vibrant worlds in this high-energy platformer, play the adventure with a friend in local co-op or on your own and help the Marsupilamis save Palombia from the Mummy Queen and her minions!
 
Marsupilami 2: Salsa Palombia will be available on PlayStation 5.

#ps5 #ps5games #marsupilami

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Moss: The Forgotten Relic - Release Date Trailer | PS5 Games
Wishlist: https://store.playstation.com/concept/10017247/

Join a tiny hero on a very big journey. Moss: The Forgotten Relic launches July 16, 2026 on PlayStation 5. 

In Moss: The Forgotten Relic, guide a tiny but determined mouse on a heartfelt journey of challenge, courage, and connection through a living storybook world filled with forgotten ruins, ancient magic, and towering dangers.  

Meet Quill, a young mouse with dreams of greatness beyond the confines of her home. When she discovers a long-lost Green Glass relic, a sacred bond is forged with a mysterious spirit companion…you. Together, as Twofold, embark on an epic journey to rescue loved ones while facing the Arcane, a ruthless force seeking to rewrite the fate of the world itself.

Quill’s journey will encounter loss, doubt, and overwhelming odds, and through it she will be challenged to find her courage and believe that even the smallest heroes can shape fate.

Moss: The Forgotten Relic unites the beloved and critically-acclaimed Book I and Book II into a definitive singular adventure, beautifully enhanced and reimagined for its flatscreen debut on PlayStation 5.

Features
• Explore a fallen kingdom slowly reclaimed by nature
• Guide a tiny hero through mysterious places and towering dangers
• Solve handcrafted, diorama-like environmental puzzles
• Discover hidden secrets and surprises off the beaten path
• Face arcane threats with optional “skip combat” accessibility
• Uncover an epic and heartfelt tale of a hero who needs you
• Orchestral soundtrack by acclaimed composer Jason Graves

#ps5 #ps5games #moss
